I WANT TO PLAY!!!!!!!!!

reviews.review_description: Every time I sign on, it will say disconnected. I usually get pissed off at it and go back to Pavlov shack. It's okay tho. I'm fine with it. I was just assuming that the game is abandoned.
Why can’t I log in anymore? Been saying that since Monday. Come on please update the game. I would pay for it. The best vr pool game out. It won’t let me reconnect
As soon as the application is launched, we have an error message which informs us that the application is disconnected. An update please. 🙏

I haven’t seen no one playing this game anymore. Whenever I enter the game on a daily basis to spin the coins wheel, no one, not a soul in sight, or online to invite to play. The game is good enough to recommend for purchase at the reasonably low price it goes for, but does need improvement on controlling cue stick speed better and allowing for jump shots. I 

UPDATE 2/9/23
Finally. The Devs have fixed multiplayer function, and restarted to implement the Daily Challenge shot.
Never managed to get into the game
"Unable to connect the server" ot something like that(quest 2/3).
Just wish we can earn our points playing against the AI since no one is ever on

It's so hard for me to actually shoot the ball. Like I move my arm but the cue only moves a bit just hitting the ball very softly. Fails almost every time. Only when I look towards my right hand it works but then I don't see the table. Very strange.

developer_response.body: Hi if you need any support, welcome to join our Discord, willing to help！ discord.gg/GEePrVGKWH

reviews.review_description: I found this gem today looking on side quest and I absolutely love it. The physics are on point. My only thing is that when grabbing your stick, it kind of stays in position and your hands aren't on it lol. Still really fun and worth downloading especially while it's free!
It keeps telling me reconnect and disconnected 😭😭

reviews.review_title: From good to trash within 1 week.
reviews.review_description: The graphics are a little strangely textured but the idea of the game -initially- made up for it. The daily wheel had 10 spins, which if you were 100% lucky (practically impossible) you could win up to 10,000 coins with the lowest being 1000 PER DAY(10x rolls between 100coins-1000). They reduced the amount from 10 to 3 spins a day. This means you can now only win up to only 3000 coins, reducing the amount of 1v1 invites youll be able to play in a session and eventually you wont be able to play because you cant bet anymore, which not only means your ability to play in a fun way can be sooner cut short - but that its a fatal flaw for a game that is already struggling to keep up the demand to find online multi-player opponents.They also don't offer the ability to microtransact the coins meaning when you're done YOU'RE DONE and there's nothing you can do about it. Keep in mind there is no other use for the coins in the game other than being charged...? For a chance to do an incredibly hard daily challenge lmao. It will charge you 100 coins and that ALSO means your play time needs to be CAUTIOUSLY RATIONED. There are NO cosmetics and other enjoyable aspects to having coins besides worrying if youll be able to play and online opponents can gatekeep the max bets until you are desperate enough to accept which could mean you only get to play ONE GAME OF POOL A DAY? ARE YOU KIDDING ME? LOL! 2ndly they have now reduced the ability to wager 10,000 coins per match to 2500. Why are you limiting the ability for adults to wager ANY amount, let alone such a MINUSCULE reward? I was unfortunate enough to play the game when you could make higher bets which now means that now I will NEVER get the satisfaction of winning 10,000 coins (seeing 20,000 in the menu) or OVER that amount meaning the stimulating aspect of betting has been ripped away from me. This is a POOL game and an adult should be allowed to bet ANY amount that they want. So yeah, there's no reward for playing AND you won't be able to play for long, it's virtual pool and you can only get so good at it. They managed to ruin the game within a week. The private lobby no longer exists so enjoy logging into a bunch of people in a small room- bothering you -until you FIND GAME in a seperate menu. The live lobby almo seemed like a cool edition but I won't be spending any more time in this game. I'll check back in 6 months, if I don't make you face this time penalty then you won't get the message- hopefully other people start to follow suit as well  >:)

reviews.review_title: Not bad but needs some work
reviews.review_description:
The GUI and art style is decent, I think you should be able to practice while waiting for players, also maybe an option to see how many people are in game. Personally I like playing without aim assist, but when there are three matchmaking options, it's hard to know which one is best to load in just to be able to play with an actual person. 

The controlls also aren't very immersive, but I get it's more of an arcadey style choice when comparing it directly to the games biggest competitors (The Rack and Black Hole Pool) 

Will be interesting to see how the game develops

Definitely showing some promise though!

reviews.review_title: Settings for left handed players needed
reviews.review_description:
This game has great potential, but I'm unable to play as I am left handed. Cannot find an option to do that. Where are the settings? Is there a way to do this? Will add more stars if I can finally play this....
Updated 7/31/2022  Really appreciate the very quick and thoughtful reply from the developers regarding the left-handed option. Next suggestion would be to make the directions less confusing - seems like there are too many steps to remember in order to take a shot. Still working on learning it and think it will be great once I know what I'm doing.

developer_response.body: You may try the left-handed tutorial now in the latest version. We are eager to let you  master the controls and that's why the tutorial might seem long. We will refine the steps in future updates and try to make it neat!

reviews.review_description:
Impressed by tutorial at the start. Controls very intuitive and nice graphics. 

First issue I found was that I couldn't see my friend in the lobby at all and during the game there was a floating cue. He could see me though, very odd. Did mention sometimes I was on the ceiling  :D Saw other avatars coming and going fine. Will see if this resolves later...

Also found it would occasionally spin me round for no reason.  Potential for moving around the table to cause motion sickness for some I would think.  Maybe add a jump to spot option which also makes you face the cue ball. It may already be there I could have missed it.

Nice work so far though looking forward to updates.

I was so excited when i find this pool game for free has love pool. Bit for some reason i cant seem to get the cue to work right every time i try to take a shot the cue doesn’t really move much. But it will take a shot when i move my head when am not ready to take a shot. I understand how the cue work right when trying to take shot. I have even tried in  the practice room and still cant seem to pull cue back right to get a good it. And when i was trying to play someone they kept getting right in my face so I couldn’t see anything or they would go and stand over the hole and cover the ball so I couldn’t see what to aim at.
The best pool game I ever see, if devs add a dominoe table I'll stay for hours!
